scripts.test:browser: pnpm build && pnpm template:verify && pnpm test:browser:foundation && pnpm test:browser:product
scripts.template:verify: pnpm product:verify && pnpm test:boundaries && pnpm test:route-boundaries && pnpm test:release && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:environment && pnpm --filter @xwlc/web test && node scripts/verify-candidate.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm product:verify && pnpm test:boundaries && pnpm test:route-boundaries && pnpm test:release && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:environment && turbo test
